title: Fiber reinforced plate articles of footwear and methods of making
abstract: A method of forming a fiber reinforced plate for an article of footwear is described. The method includes embroidering a reinforcing strand to a substrate layer with a thread according to a strand configuration. One or more substrate layers with strand configurations are arranged relative to a base plate. The one or more substrate layers are bonded to the base plate to form the fiber reinforced plate. The reinforcing strands may be formed of a heat fusible material so that adjacent segments of the strands bond to one another and/or the substrate layer. Various strand configurations of reinforcing strands embroidered to substrate layers are described. Multiple substrate layers with different strand configurations can be bonded together with a base plate to form a fiber reinforced plate with reinforcement at selected locations based on the strand configurations.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A method of forming a reinforced sole structure for an article of footwear, the method comprising: attaching a reinforcing strand to a substrate layer according to a first strand configuration, the reinforcing strand being attached so that a first strand segment is disposed adjacent a second strand segment; and heating the reinforcing strand and the substrate layer so the first strand segment and the second strand segment fuse together 2. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the reinforcing strand is a composite yarn including at least one portion of carbon fiber, fiberglass, or para-aramid fiber and at least one portion of a thermoplastic material 3. The method according to claim 2, wherein the substrate layer is made of a materia! including a thermoplastic. 4. The method according to claim 2, wherein the reinforcing strand is stitched to the substrate layer using a thread 5. The method according to claim 4, wherein the thread is made of a material including a thermoplastic. 6. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the first strand segment and the second strand segment are in contact with one another 7. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the method includes attaching the substrate layer with the reinforcing strand to a base plate. 8. A method of forming a reinforced plate for an article of footwear, the method comprising: embroidering a reinforcing strand to a substrate layer according to a strand configuration; and attaching the substrate layer having the reinforcing strand to a base plate to form the reinforced plate. 9. The method according to claim 8, wherein the step of embroidering the reinforcing strand includes stitching the reinforcing strand to the substrate layer with a thread. 10. The method according to claim 9, wherein the thread is made of a thermoplastic materia!. 11. The method according to claim 8, wherein the substrate layer is made of a thermoplastic material. 12. The method according to claim 8, wherein the reinforcing strand is a composite yarn including at least one portion of carbon fiber, fiberglass, or para-aramid fiber and at least one portion of a thermoplastic material. 13. The method according to claim 8, wherein the method further includes heating and pressing the substrate layer with the reinforced strand. 14. The method according to claim 8, wherein the method includes embroidering a second reinforcing strand to a second substrate layer according to a second strand configuration and wherein the method includes attaching the second substrate layer with the second reinforcing strand to the reinforcing layer with the reinforcing strand. 15. The method according to claim 14, wherein the first strand configuration and the second strand configuration are different from each other. 16. A reinforced plate for an article of footwear, the reinforced plate comprising: a base plate; a first substrate layer disposed on the base piate, the first substrate layer including a first reinforcing strand embroidered onto the first substrate layer according to a first strand configuration; and a second substrate layer disposed on one of the first substrate layer or the base plate, the second substrate layer including a second reinforcing strand embroidered onto the second substrate layer according to a second strand configuration. 17. The reinforced plate according to claim 16, wherein the first strand configuration is different from the second strand configuration. 18. The reinforced plate according to claim 16, wherein at least a portion of the first reinforcing strand overlaps at least a portion of the second reinforcing strand. 19. The reinforced plate according to claim 16, wherein at least one of the first strand configuration and the second strand configuration includes concentric rings formed by a reinforcing strand. 20. The reinforced plate according to claim 16, wherein the first reinforcing strand is heat fused to the first substrate layer and wherein the second reinforcing strand is heat fused to the second substrate layer.
